root_cause: Deployment rollout blocked by admission webhook failures
evidence: Repeated admission webhook failure events observed during controller pod creation

causes.message: Deployment 'web' is attempting to create replicas
Admission webhook failures are blocking new pod creation
Deployment cannot reach desired replica availability

likely_causes: Mutating or validating webhook is rejecting pod creations
Webhook connectivity or TLS issues are blocking admission
Policy engine instability is preventing rollout progress
suggested_checks: Review ReplicaSet and controller events for FailedCreate
